findings.title: SQL injection in /u via req.query.id
findings.statement: req.query.id flows unsanitized into a SELECT string, allowing SQL injection.
findings.recommendation: Use a parameterized query / prepared statement for the id.

findings.title: Command injection in /run via req.query.c
findings.statement: req.query.c is passed directly to execSync, allowing arbitrary command execution.
findings.recommendation: Never pass user input to execSync; use an allowlist or execFile with fixed args.
